Connect

Algebra Integral

An innovative AMM codebase, splitting the previously monolithic DEX setup into the immutable Core & tailored Plugins to create customizable Concentrated Liquidity pools.

Secured
Audited by top companies
Read the docs →
Modular Architecture
The "Core-Plugins" architecture allows for DEX updates: no liquidity migration & up to 22% in gas efficiency on avg via an adaptable set of plugins on top of pools.
Set of Plugins to Adjust Every Pool
Any feature can be built into a DEX as a plugin; Plugins connected to a liquidity pool can be updated or disconnected without trading disruption.
An Open Ecosystem
All Web3 projects & developers can propose their own plugins for Plugins Marketplace & generate revenue with Integral DEXes.

Algebra CLAMM

Your favorite CLAMM integrated by most DEXes in DeFi, with the already legendary features, all wrapped up into one Algebra codebase.

Secured
Audited by top companies
Read the docs →
Concentrated Liquidity
Enabling users to choose a custom price range to consolidate their funds & earn higher fees through deeper liquidity & higher generated volume.
Dynamic Fees
Calculating the fee depending on risks, volatility of assets, trading & pool volumes, and other factors. The right balance between traders & liquidity providers is guaranteed!
Built-in Farming
Allow users to participate in farming with their liquidity pool positions.

Ecosystem

Develop your project with Algebra Protocol! Receive the right to use our technologies – modular architecture and concentrated liquidity – to boost your projects’ efficiency and change the rules of the DeFi. We’re always glad to arrange new partnerships and marketing activities.

Apply now

Algebra is a DEX Engine enabling projects to integrate Modular Architecture and Concentrated Liquidity tech. Already integrated into Camelot, THENA, QuickSwap, StellaSwap, Lynex, Swapsicle, Synthswap, and other DEXes, Algebra propels them to higher trading volume & enhanced capital efficiency.
